name: The Back Nine Golf | Columbus, OH - Upper Arlington
about: The Back Nine Golf in Columbus, OH offers a golf simulation experience in the Upper Arlington area. The venue is accessible online with a dedicated website, though specific details about its technology, amenities, and pricing are not currently available due to access restrictions. This location appears to be part of a chain, suggesting a standardized approach to indoor golf entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient urban location for year-round play
Versatile space for various group sizes and events

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with beer, wine, and cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with dual radar technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are provided at the venue, but you're welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers full kitchen and bar services.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole round typically takes 60-90 minutes depending on simulator speed and player skill level.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine welcomes families and has activities suitable for junior golfers and children.
